description_long: This is a modern, minimalist desk lamp with a cylindrical base and a straight, slender vertical stem supporting a conical lamp head. The lamp head is angled slightly downward and features a prominent, round white diffuser at the front, likely to soften and spread the emitted light. The body and base are matte black, giving the lamp a sleek and contemporary appearance suitable for urban or office environments. The lamp head appears to be adjustable, with visible hinge or pivot points at the connection to the stem. The overall design is functional and unadorned, emphasizing clean lines and geometric simplicity. There are no visible decorative embellishments, focusing instead on utility and modern aesthetics.
description: A sleek, matte black desk lamp with a conical head and round white diffuser, supported by a straight stem and circular base. The design is minimalist and modern, with an adjustable lamp head.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round white diffuser and the conical lamp head, with the stem and circular base clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated conical shape of the lamp head and the straight vertical stem, with the back of the lamp head visible.
description_view_2: Rear three-quarter view showing the back of the lamp head, including hinge or pivot details, and the connection to the stem.
description_view_3: Angled front view displaying both the white diffuser and the side profile of the lamp head, as well as the full base.
